name: White Hot Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the milk and sugar until just below a boil. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped white chocolate and milk chocolate. Let stand for 2 minutes. Transfer to a blender and whip until frothy. Add Creme de cacao if desired. Serve hot.
Note: Be sure to use high-quality white chocolate instead of coating chocolate. Recommended brands include Daskalides, Callebaut, and Lindt, available at Treasure Island food stores and specialty markets.
